Godrick, the Grafted.note: Phase 2 fire arm adds fire damage. Stay close.

Maliketh the Black Blade.note: Fast, aggressive. Claw parries Destined Death

Malenia, Blade of Miquella.note: Heals on hit. Waterfowl Dance at 75% HP. Freezing Pot interrupts it.

Mohg, Lord of Blood.note: Shackle works phase 1. Purifying Tear negates Nihil

Commander Niall.note: Bewitching Branch turns his summons against him

Lichdragon Fortissax.note: Required for Fia ending. Death Lightning

Sir Gideon Ofnir, the All-Knowing.note: NPC spellcaster. Weak to lightning. Can be staggered easily.

Red Wolf of Radagon.note: Fast gap-closer. Glintstone sorceries. Short openings after combos.

Draconic Tree Sentinel.note: Lightning attacks phase 2. Shield poke + patience.

Godfrey, the First Lord.note: Shade version. Stomps create shockwaves — jump to dodge.

Hoarah Loux, the Warrior.note: Phase 2 grabs are one-shots at low VIG. Roll into, not away.

Divine Beast Dancing Lion.note: Elemental phase shifts. Lightning form most dangerous.

Rellana, Twin Moon Knight.note: Dual-wield magic/fire combos. Punish after big slams.

Messmer the Impaler.note: Aggressive spear combos. Phase 2 serpent form.

Romina, Saint of the Bud.note: Scarlet Rot buildup. Bring Preserving Boluses.

Promised Consort Radahn.note: Multi-phase. Miquella buffs in phase 2. Endurance fight.
